statement: View Helper Island cross-view bridge — The View Helper Island bridges Kanban and Timeline so users can plan across both without switching context manually. — In Timeline view it shows a Kanban-style helper (zoomable, visually similar to main Kanban); tasks with set communication dates are disabled; undated tasks can be dragged into a timeline day, and dropping onto a day links/assigns the task to that campaign day. In Kanban view it shows a weekly timeline helper; scheduled tasks appear by week/day; dragging a task from the helper into an action changes the task's phase/action while the date remains unless changed. Uses the shared sticky/resizable/minimizable popup shell.
ux_impact: Plan across views without losing context.
